message:
fix: harden abort handling, UTF-8 safety, IO guards, and extension streaming

Abort lifecycle:
- Always emit abort message to ensure TurnEnd fires reliably
- Emit MessageStart on abort before stream starts to prevent orphaned updates
- Remove premature abort bail-out in tool execution phase so tool start
  events are always emitted

Extension dispatcher:
- Rewrite child process stdout/stderr capture from blocking read_to_end to
  streaming pump with channel-based interleaving (8KB chunks via
  sync_channel(128))
- Add output size cap (2x DEFAULT_MAX_BYTES) to prevent OOM on verbose
  extension output
- Add 2-second drain deadline after process exit for remaining chunks

UTF-8 safety (extensions.rs, extensions_js.rs, extension_preflight.rs):
- Rewrite UTF-8 stream processing with loop-based approach that emits
  U+FFFD replacement characters for invalid sequences instead of returning
  errors
- Fix truncate_snippet to use char_indices for safe truncation
- Fix strip_block_comment_tracking to use chars iterator instead of raw
  byte indexing
- Fix contains_global_mutation to scan ALL occurrences via match_indices
  instead of stopping at first find()

Tool guards (tools.rs):
- Add WRITE_TOOL_MAX_BYTES (100MB) limit to EditTool and WriteTool inputs
- Fix truncate_head to preserve partial first-line content instead of
  returning empty string
- Fix ReadTool to bounds-check start_line + i against total_lines
- Switch edit/write temp file writes from async to sync std::io::Write
  for correctness with NamedTempFile
- Add graceful fallback when bash output spill to temp file fails

TUI fixes:
- Skip cursor_up escape when n=0 (no-op guard)
- Fix strip_markup to handle escaped brackets ([[->[) correctly

Security:
- Add PI_* environment variables to secret broker unconditional allowlist
- Remove stale TODO for fixed security gap G-2 in adversarial extension test

Docs:
- Fix UBS install URL branch (master->main)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -763,7 +763,7 @@ Also, if I ask you to explicitly use your built-in TODO functionality, don't com
 
 UBS stands for "Ultimate Bug Scanner": **The AI Coding Agent's Secret Weapon: Flagging Likely Bugs for Fixing Early On**
 
-**Install:** `curl -sSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Dicklesworthstone/ultimate_bug_scanner/master/install.sh | bash`
+**Install:** `curl -sSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Dicklesworthstone/ultimate_bug_scanner/main/install.sh | bash`
 
 **Golden Rule:** `ubs <changed-files>` before every commit. Exit 0 = safe. Exit >0 = fix & re-run.
